remarks: Experience the best of downtown Stamford living in this beautifully updated top-floor 1-bedroom, 1-bath residence offering 770 sq ft of stylish, comfortable living space and unbeatable convenience. Facing downtown and south, this unit is bathed in natural light throughout the entire day. Perfectly situated in the heart of the city, you'll enjoy a true walk-everywhere lifestyle-just steps from Target, Stamford Town Center, restaurants, entertainment, public transportation, and several parks. No car is needed!  Inside, you'll find gorgeous dark hardwood floors, a spacious and inviting, open layout, and a modern kitchen featuring brand-new appliances, including a gas range and dishwasher. The unit offers ample in-unit storage, plus additional storage available in the building's dedicated storage room. Step outside to your oversized private patio-the perfect place to relax or entertain while enjoying breathtaking panoramic views of the Stamford skyline from the top floor. Residents also enjoy excellent amenities, including two elevators and an on-site laundry room with washers and dryers.  Rent includes heat, hot water, cold water, gas, sewer, and trash. The tenant is responsible for electric, internet, cable, and renters insurance.
